mnemonics: Comma Separated Values are Columns Separated by Commas
keyPoints: Use pandas.read_csv() to read CSV files into a DataFrame
Always specify the correct delimiter (e.g., sep=',') for the file format
Handle missing data appropriately using na_values or keep_default_na parameters
commonMistakes: Forgetting to handle header rows, leading to misaligned columns
Not specifying the correct encoding (e.g., 'utf-8') for files with special characters
Using plain Python file I/O instead of pandas for data science tasks, resulting in inefficient code
